ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response shows context relevance and persona consistency but lacks some naturalness in phrasing, slightly affecting overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Excellent, as it adheres strictly to protocol without unnecessary deviation from the persona or situation.<TAB>The context relevance was high due to work-related duties.

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as a methodical and risk-aware Systems Engineer would not take unnecessary risks with sensitive information; naturalness in speech style aligns well with the character's background. The overall quality of communication could be improved by providing more details about why access was denied to enhance understanding for players, but it remains professional and appropriate given context constraints.
